mapper.sql: id, student_id, school_name, country, degree_level, major, start_date, end_date, certificate_url, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_education (student_id, school_name, country, degree_level, major, start_date, end_date, certificate_url, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{schoolName}, #{country}, #{degreeLevel}, #{major}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{certificateUrl}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE student_education
school_name = #{schoolName}, country = #{country}, degree_level = #{degreeLevel}, major = #{major}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, certificate_url = #{certificateUrl}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE student_education SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM student_education WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM student_education WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
